entries.title: Depthfirst Raises $80 Million in Series B Funding
entries.summary: The startup will expand its AI research team, train additional security models, and scale enterprise adoption. The post Depthfirst Raises $80 Million in Series B Funding appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Toy Giant Hasbro Hit by Cyberattack
entries.summary: The company is investigating the full scope of the incident, including whether any files have been compromised. The post Toy Giant Hasbro Hit by Cyberattack appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: New DeepLoad Malware Dropped in ClickFix Attacks
entries.summary: The malware steals credentials, installs a malicious browser extension, and can spread via USB drives. The post New DeepLoad Malware Dropped in ClickFix Attacks appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Exploited Zero-Day Among 21 Vulnerabilities Patched in Chrome
entries.summary: Google has announced fixes for CVE-2026-5281, a zero-day affecting Chrome’s Dawn component. The post Exploited Zero-Day Among 21 Vulnerabilities Patched in Chrome appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: FBI Warns of Data Security Risks From China-Made Mobile Apps
entries.summary: The agency has not named the problematic foreign-made applications, but TikTok and Temu come to mind. The post FBI Warns of Data Security Risks From China-Made Mobile Apps appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: US Charges Uranium Crypto Exchange Hacker
entries.summary: Jonathan Spalletta exploited smart contract vulnerabilities to steal approximately $55 million in cryptocurrency and cause Uranium to shut down. The post US Charges Uranium Crypto Exchange Hacker appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Webinar Today: Agentic AI vs. Identity’s Last Mile Problem
entries.summary: Join the webcast as we explore what Agentic AI can and cannot solve today, and real world breach scenarios linked to disconnected applications. The post Webinar Today: Agentic AI vs. Identity’s Last Mile Problem appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Axios NPM Package Breached in North Korean Supply Chain Attack
entries.summary: A long-lived NPM access token was used to bypass the GitHub Actions OIDC-based CI/CD publishing workflow and push backdoored package versions. The post Axios NPM Package Breached in North Korean Supply Chain Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Google Addresses Vertex Security Issues After Researchers Weaponize AI Agents
entries.summary: Palo Alto Networks has disclosed the details of its analysis of Google Cloud Platform’s Vertex AI. The post Google Addresses Vertex Security Issues After Researchers Weaponize AI Agents appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Censys Raises $70 Million for Internet Intelligence Platform
entries.summary: The latest funding round brings the total venture capital investment in Censys to $149 million. The post Censys Raises $70 Million for Internet Intelligence Platform appeared first on SecurityWeek .
